summary: Executed backend pytest regression (12 tests) and mobile-first Expo web-preview integration checks for tonality renderer + site proxy + ruliad/artifact/painter-tip/speckles behavior.

minor.issue: Implemented as async route but uses blocking requests.get; can block event loop under concurrent traffic.

ui_bugs.issue: Primary button height is 38px on mobile, below recommended 44px touch target.
Option text still says 'complement vibration in darks' even though requirement asks cool CMY-side wording and not complement/cad red framing.

integration_issues.issue: Injected HTML initializes mhFrame with direct src='https://example.com' before JS rewrites it to site-html?url=..., so proxy-only behavior is not strict at initial markup level.

issues: Primary render CTA touch target below 44px minimum.

action_items: Update speckles control option copy to remove 'complement' wording and align with cool CMY-side vibration requirement.
Make mhFrame initial src proxy-based (site-html?url=...) in markup, not only after JS render().
Increase mobile toolbar button height (especially mhRenderBtn) to >=44px.
Consider replacing blocking requests.get in /api/site-html with async HTTP client to avoid event-loop blocking.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py is very large and embeds a long HTML+JS string; maintainability risk and difficult diff review.
Frontend API helper uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL while platform guidance expects EXPO_BACKEND_URL; config drift risk.
No MOCKED API observed during this run.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_pytest render record through POST /api/renders during persistence test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated on public preview URL https://hex-palette-render.preview.emergentagent.com with 375x667 viewport. Verified /api/health, /api/site-html, /api/tonality-renderer, ruliad generation (49 nodes/31 links), artifact generation (33 lines with variable heights after spacing=2 thickness=17), and painter tip updates between dark/light tone states.
rca_of_issue: Speckles wording mismatch RCA: control label title was updated to cool CMY guidance, but option display string still contains legacy 'complement vibration in darks'. Proxy boot-state RCA: iframe markup keeps direct URL as default and only switches to /site-html after JS render() runs.
